name: GOLFTEC Stamford
about: GOLFTEC Stamford is a professional golf instruction and fitting center specializing in data-driven coaching. The venue utilizes advanced technology, including OPTIMOTION motion measurement, high-speed video analysis, and launch monitors, to provide personalized improvement plans for golfers of all skill levels. Services include private lessons, club fitting with top brands, and access to training bays equipped with simulator technology for practice and play.
why_golfers_like_it: Data-driven swing analysis using OPTIMOTION technology
Personalized improvement plans with expert PGA coaches
Advanced launch monitor feedback for precise practice
Custom club fitting to optimize performance
Indoor simulator bays for year-round practice

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While you can bring your own clubs, GOLFTEC provides equipment and also offers club fitting services to help you find the perfect clubs for your swing.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or beverages are mentioned as being allowed at the GOLFTEC Stamford location.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole simulator session take?
faq.answer: While the exact time isn't specified, simulator sessions typically take 1-2 hours depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: GOLFTEC offers junior golf programs and instruction, making it suitable for youth golfers, though specific kid-friendly amenities aren't detailed.
